ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or continent the country belongs to */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emissions_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emissions record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the emissions data */,
  "emissions_value" REAL /* Measured emissions value for the year */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the emission category */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the emissions value */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level or uncertainty associated with the emissions value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES emission_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year associated with emissions data */,
  "is_leap_year" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the year is a leap year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_years_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES emissions_data ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the emission category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the category is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., national inventory) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., government, research institution) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of how data is collected */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the emissions data record */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality check was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Result of the quality check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the quality check */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the quality check */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for the quality check (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES emissions_data ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact purposes */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp for user activity tracking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual summary, detailed analysis) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary or abstract of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file where the report is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report associated with the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  "settings" TEXT /* Settings for the visualization (e.g., axes, color scheme) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmarking" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmarking record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country being benchmarked */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of benchmarking */,
  "benchmark_value" REAL /* Value used for benchmarking against other countries' emissions */,
  "benchmark_type" TEXT /* Type of benchmark (e.g., per capita, per GDP) */,
  "benchmark_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the benchmark value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarking_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarking_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the trend */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the observed trend */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the trend */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_trends_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
